welcomeAdmin.heading: Welcome
welcomeAdmin.subheading: Lead Bug Bounty — central point of the program, held by the project owner through their company.

mission.title: Your role as Lead Bug Bounty
mission.intro: This role is the central point of the program. It cannot be delegated and carries the company’s full legal responsibility.

items.ywhAccount: Ownership and management of the YesWeHack account
items.ywhRelations: Official relationship with YesWeHack and Bug Bounty programs
items.finalValidation: Final validation of vulnerabilities before submission
items.submission: Submission of reports on the platform
items.legalFinancial: Legal, tax, and financial management of bounties
items.arbitration: Arbitration of priorities, scope, and conflicts

mission.boundary: You are the only party authorized to commit the company toward YesWeHack and the programs.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Accounts and application roles
users.body: Review registered accounts and their roles in the application.

register.title: Register a user
register.subtitle: Account creation — Lead only
register.body: Create an account for a hunter, mentor, quality checker, or another role in the program.

teams.title: Report teams
teams.subtitle: Team oversight
teams.body: Create and manage report teams (composition, coordinator, assignments).

finalValidation.title: Final validation
finalValidation.subtitle: Drafts ready for sign-off
finalValidation.body: Review all report drafts and validate those ready to submit to the program.

ipAccess.title: IP whitelist
ipAccess.subtitle: Network access control
ipAccess.body: Enable whitelist-only mode and manage allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges.
